description_long: This is a vintage cylindrical metal tin with a fitted lid, designed to store medicinal powder. The tin is decorated with ornate floral and geometric motifs, and features Italian text in red and black, including the prominent word 'Maga' on the front. The surface of the tin shows signs of age, with visible rust, scratches, and faded paint, giving it a weathered, antique appearance. The tin is placed on a rough, irregularly cut wooden plank, which serves as a base and adds to the rustic aesthetic. The label includes detailed product information and branding, though some areas are partially obscured or worn. The overall look suggests it was once used for storing a medicinal product, likely in powder form, and is now an artifact of historical interest.
description: A weathered, ornate metal medicine tin with Italian text and floral motifs, showing signs of age and rust, set on a rough wooden plank.
description_view_0: The tin is seen from the side, with ornate vertical patterns and partial text visible, and the wooden plank base is prominent.
description_view_1: The front of the tin displays the 'Maga' brand and most of the label text, with the floral design and product details clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side view shows more of the tin's vertical decorative elements and a large, rusted area obscuring some text.
description_view_3: The tin's label is visible with the 'Maga' name and additional product information, while the wooden plank's rough edge is prominent.
attribute_label_text: Maga Polvere idrofuga per bambini assorbente antisettica igienica [illegible] SCATOLA
